items.title: How Generali Malaysia optimizes operations with Amazon EKS
items.snippet: In this post, we look at how Generali is using Amazon EKS Auto Mode and its integration with other AWS services to enhance performance while reducing operational overhead, optimizing costs, and enhancing security.

items.title: AWS HealthImaging is now available in Europe (London)

items.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime adds WebRTC support for real-time bidirectional streaming
items.snippet: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime now supports WebRTC for real-time bidirectional streaming between clients and agents, adding to the existing WebSocket protocol support. With WebRTC, developers can build voice agents for browser and mobile applications that…

items.title: Amazon EKS announces 99.99% Service Level Agreement and new 8XL scaling tier for Provisioned Control Plane clusters
items.snippet: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) now offers a 99.99% Service Level Agreement (SLA) for clusters running on Provisioned Control Plane, up from the 99.95% SLA offered on standard control plane. Amazon EKS is also introducing the 8XL scaling tier,…

items.title: AWS Neuron announces support for Dynamic Resource Allocation with Amazon EKS
items.snippet: AWS announces the Neuron Dynamic Resource Allocation (DRA) driver for Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS), bringing Kubernetes-native hardware-aware scheduling to AWS Trainium-based instances. The Neuron DRA driver publishes rich device attributes…

items.snippet: AWS DataSync now supports AWS Secrets Manager for credential management across all location types, including Hadoop Distributed File System (HDFS), Amazon FSx for Windows File Server, and Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP. Previously, Secrets Manager integration…

items.title: Amazon EC2 Fleet now supports interruptible Capacity Reservations
items.snippet: Amazon EC2 Fleet now supports interruptible Capacity Reservations. EC2 Fleet allows you to launch instances across multiple instance types and Availability Zones. Starting today, you can specify interruptible Capacity Reservation IDs across your Launch…

items.title: AWS Lambda now supports Availability Zone metadata

items.title: AWS Direct Connect announces new location in Sydney, Australia

items.title: 20 years in the AWS Cloud – how time flies!
items.snippet: Celebrating twenty years of innovation in ML and AI technology at AWS. Countless developers—myself included—have embraced cloud computing and actively used its capabilities to accomplish what was previously impossible.
